name: crypto_deep_analysis
description: Deep-dive crypto analysis agent. Provides comprehensive fundamental, technical, and sentiment analysis for any cryptocurrency. Covers tokenomics, on-chain metrics, price action, support/resistance levels, market sentiment, and actionable insights.

coin.description: The cryptocurrency name or ticker to analyze (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL, ARB)

timeframe.description: Analysis timeframe: short-term (1-7 days), mid-term (1-4 weeks), or long-term (1-6 months). Defaults to mid-term.

focus.description: Optional focus area: fundamental, technical, sentiment, or all. Defaults to all.

context.description: Optional additional context or specific questions about the coin
